title: Criterion Channel Adds K-ON! Film in May
content: HIDIVE began streaming the film in December 2023. The movie depicts a story not told in the television series, and follows the five female members of Sakuragaoka High School's light music club on their graduation trip to England. The film opened in theaters in Japan in December 2011.
author: ANN

title: Event Report: Tanuki to Kitsune Celebrated 10th Anniversary With Anime Announcement, AnimeJapan 2026 Showcase
content: The Tanuki to Kitsune series was featured as a central highlight at the Frontier Works booth during AnimeJapan 2026 , as the franchise marks its 10th anniversary and prepares for its upcoming TV anime adaptation.
author: Anime Corner

title: MARRIAGETOXIN Reveals Creditless Opening and Ending Videos
content: MARRIAGETOXIN anime revealed the creditless opening and ending video movies, as well as a special video of the voice cast dancing to the OP song. Studio BONES Film is handling the animation production, which premiered on April 3 . The opening song is “Kill or Kiss” by Yurina Hirate.
author: Anime Corner

title: Xenosaga Pied Piper, Namco Chronicle, Digital Devil Saga Games Get Steam, Switch Releases
content: G-MODE announced on Thursday it will release the Xenosaga Pied Piper role-playing game on both Steam and Nintendo Switch. The Steam release lists the game in Japanese only, with no English support. G-MODE is releasing the game as part of its G-MODE Archives+ label that releases mobile games for Switch and Steam .
author: ANN

title: Anime Expo Hosts Livetune, TeddyLoid, Kazuo Maekawa, karory
content: Entry is included with attendees' Anime Expo credentials and no separate ticket is required. Staff also announced earlier this week that Anime Expo will host Kazuo Maekawa , a manga creator with more than 30 years of experience and the lead instructor at Manga Dojo Tokyo.
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll Reveals English Dub Cast, Staff for Mistress Kanan is Devilishly Easy, Ascendance of a Bookworm Part 3 Anime
content: Crunchyroll revealed the English dub cast and staff on Friday for the television anime of nonco 's Mistress Kanan is Devilishly Easy ( Kanan-sama wa Akumade Choroi ) manga and Ascendance of a Bookworm Part 3: Adopted Daughter of an Archduke , the new television anime of Miya Kazuki 's Ascendance of a Bookworm (…
author: ANN

title: Bandai Namco Filmworks Streams 1st 2 Episodes of Magical Sisters LuluttoLilly Anime With English Subtitles
content: Bandai Namco Filmworks began streaming on Saturday the first two episodes of Mahō no Shimai Lulutto Lilly ( Magical Sisters Lulutto Lilly ), the new magical girl television anime that it is presenting with Studio Pierrot , on YouTube . The YouTube video has subtitles in 16 languages including English.
author: ANN

title: Death Stranding 2: On the Beach Game Wins BAFTA Award
content: The game was nominated for seven awards including: Best Animation, Artistic Achievement, Audio Achievement, Best Music, Best Narrative, Technical Achievement, and Best Performer in a Supporting Role ( Troy Baker ).
author: ANN

title: 30 Years Later, Crunchyroll Is Finally Streaming Classic Comedy Anime
content: Launched in 2017, the streaming platform Crunchyroll has risen through the ranks to become the biggest hub for anime fans across the globe. Naturally, this means that a large plethora of anime series can be found on the platform, including new ones that are being released every week.
author: ComicBook

title: Black Clover Is Setting Up Its Finale With Exciting Surprises
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Black Clover manga! After more than 10 years of serialization, Yuki Tabata’s hit action-fantasy series Black Clover is closer to its finale than ever.
author: ComicBook
